comment: Behavioral security patterns for ContentAwarePolicyChecker. Covers credential file access, exfiltration indicators, and C2/reverse-shell signatures. Personal overrides live in ~/.memory/config/behavioral_patterns.json.

patterns.name: ssh_private_key_path
patterns.description: SSH private key file path in tool args

patterns.name: etc_shadow
patterns.description: Attempt to access /etc/shadow (password hashes)

patterns.name: etc_passwd_write
patterns.description: Reference to /etc/passwd in tool args

patterns.name: aws_credentials_file
patterns.description: AWS credentials file path in tool args

patterns.name: gcloud_credentials
patterns.description: GCloud credentials file path in tool args

patterns.name: docker_config_auth
patterns.description: Docker config (may contain registry auth tokens) in tool args

patterns.name: gpg_private_key
patterns.description: GPG private key store path in tool args

patterns.name: netrc_file
patterns.description: .netrc file (stores plaintext credentials) in tool args

patterns.name: kubeconfig
patterns.description: Kubernetes config file (contains cluster credentials) in tool args

patterns.name: dev_tcp_redirect
patterns.description: Bash /dev/tcp reverse shell pattern detected

patterns.name: netcat_exec
patterns.description: Netcat reverse shell (-e /bin/sh) pattern detected

patterns.name: python_reverse_shell
patterns.description: Python reverse shell pattern detected

patterns.name: perl_reverse_shell
patterns.description: Perl reverse shell pattern detected

patterns.name: mkfifo_pipe_shell
patterns.description: mkfifo named-pipe reverse shell pattern detected

patterns.name: socat_exec
patterns.description: Socat EXEC shell pattern detected

patterns.name: base64_large_payload
patterns.description: Large base64-encoded payload (possible data exfiltration) in tool args

patterns.name: curl_data_to_external
patterns.description: curl sending data payload to external URL

patterns.name: wget_post_external
patterns.description: wget sending POST data to external URL

patterns.name: scp_outbound
patterns.description: scp outbound file transfer pattern detected

patterns.name: rsync_outbound
patterns.description: rsync outbound transfer to remote host

patterns.name: sudo_chmod_suid
patterns.description: Setting SUID/SGID bit via chmod

patterns.name: crontab_modification
patterns.description: Crontab modification detected

patterns.name: ld_preload_injection
patterns.description: LD_PRELOAD library injection pattern detected
